news.headline: U.S. offers no help with Iran war’s fallout, Thai foreign minister says
news.summary: “This war should not have taken place,” Sihasak Phuangketkeow said in an interview, adding that Thailand is approaching Russia and China amid its economic crisis.

news.summary:

news.headline: Tens of thousands flock to French kite festival as record smashed
news.summary: Spectacular kites, huge crowds and glorious weather - the 39th edition of the International Kite Festival, in Berck-sur-Mer, just wrapped up in the north of France, having succesfully set a world record for the longest kite ever flown at 100 metres-long.
